name: Fettucine Pie Kjcd19b
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion in a skillet.
2. Stir in the tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper.
3. Bring to a boil. Simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and add mozzarella and 1/2 cup Parmesan. Let stand 9-12 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, cook the Fettucini according to package instructions.
6. Beat eggs and stir in the remaining Parmesan, butter, parsley, and garlic powder.
7. Stir into hot noodles.
8. Spoon onto tomato mixture. Cover and cook over low heat for 15 minutes or until set. Let stand 5 minutes.
9. Turn out on a round platter.
